'''âd-w-w''' ('''dawawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naufragate|naufragate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naufragate|naufragate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-w-w
|-
! Lemma
| dawawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dawawithi|dawawithi]] || [[word:dawawiji|dawawiji]] || [[word:dawawishi|dawawishi]] || [[word:dawawi|dawawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawawuthuth|dawawuthuth]] || [[word:dawawujuj|dawawujuj]] || [[word:dawawushush|dawawushush]] || [[word:dawaw|dawaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawawuthu|dawawuthu]] || [[word:dawawuju|dawawuju]] || [[word:dawawushu|dawawushu]] || [[word:dawawu|dawawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawawufuth|dawawufuth]] || [[word:dawawufuj|dawawufuj]] || [[word:dawawufush|dawawufush]] || [[word:dawawuf|dawawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dawawethe|dawawethe]] || [[word:dawaweje|dawaweje]] || [[word:dawaweshe|dawaweshe]] || [[word:dawawe|dawawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawawothoth|dawawothoth]] || [[word:dawawojoj|dawawojoj]] || [[word:dawawoshosh|dawawoshosh]] || [[word:dawaw|dawaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawawotho|dawawotho]] || [[word:dawawojo|dawawojo]] || [[word:dawawosho|dawawosho]] || [[word:dawawo|dawawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawawofoth|dawawofoth]] || [[word:dawawofoj|dawawofoj]] || [[word:dawawofosh|dawawofosh]] || [[word:dawawof|dawawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dawawĂŠthĂŠ|dawawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dawawĂŠjĂŠ|dawawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dawawĂŠshĂŠ|dawawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dawawĂŠ|dawawĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawawathath|dawawathath]] || [[word:dawawajaj|dawawajaj]] || [[word:dawawashash|dawawashash]] || [[word:dawaw|dawaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawawatha|dawawatha]] || [[word:dawawaja|dawawaja]] || [[word:dawawasha|dawawasha]] || [[word:dawawa|dawawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawawafath|dawawafath]] || [[word:dawawafaj|dawawafaj]] || [[word:dawawafash|dawawafash]] || [[word:dawawaf|dawawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dawawasha|dawawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godawawasha|godawawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidawawasha|gokidawawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dawawnĂŒsha|dawawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godawawnknĂŒsha|godawawnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidawawnĂŒsha|gokidawawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dawawshĂ«sha|dawawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godawawnkshĂ«sha|godawawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidawawshĂ«sha|gokidawawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dawawrosha|dawawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godawawnkrosha|godawawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidawawrosha|gokidawawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawmusha|dawawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godawawnkmusha|godawawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawmusha|gokidawawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dawawsherasha|dawawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godawawnksherasha|godawawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidawawsherasha|gokidawawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dawawngasha|dawawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godawawnkngasha|godawawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidawawngasha|gokidawawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dawawyasha|dawawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godawawnkyasha|godawawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidawawyasha|gokidawawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dawawyamasha|dawawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godawawnkyamasha|godawawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidawawyamasha|gokidawawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dawawnĂŒshĂ«sha|dawawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godawawnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godawawnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidawawnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidawawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dawawnĂŒrosha|dawawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godawawnknĂŒrosha|godawawnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidawawnĂŒrosha|gokidawawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawnĂŒmusha|dawawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godawawnknĂŒmusha|godawawnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawnĂŒmusha|gokidawawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dawawshĂ«nĂŒsha|dawawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godawawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godawawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidawawshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidawawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dawawshĂ«rosha|dawawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godawawnkshĂ«rosha|godawawnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidawawshĂ«rosha|gokidawawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawshĂ«musha|dawawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godawawnkshĂ«musha|godawawnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawshĂ«musha|gokidawawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dawawronĂŒsha|dawawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godawawnkronĂŒsha|godawawnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidawawronĂŒsha|gokidawawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dawawroshĂ«sha|dawawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godawawnkroshĂ«sha|godawawnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidawawroshĂ«sha|gokidawawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawromusha|dawawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godawawnkromusha|godawawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawromusha|gokidawawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dawawmunĂŒsha|dawawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godawawnkmunĂŒsha|godawawnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidawawmunĂŒsha|gokidawawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dawawmushĂ«sha|dawawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godawawnkmushĂ«sha|godawawnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidawawmushĂ«sha|gokidawawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dawawmurosha|dawawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godawawnkmurosha|godawawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidawawmurosha|gokidawawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dawaw|dawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠw|dĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodawaw|hodawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodĂŠwĂŠw|hodĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodawaw|hohodawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodĂŠwĂŠw|hohodĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdawaw|nĂŒdawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdĂŠwĂŠw|nĂŒdĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdawaw|nĂŒnĂŒdawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠwĂŠw|nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdawaw|nĂŻdawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdĂŠwĂŠw|nĂŻdĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdawaw|nĂŻnĂŻdawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠwĂŠw|nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludawaw|ludawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludĂŠwĂŠw|ludĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludawaw|luludawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludĂŠwĂŠw|luludĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidawaw|lidawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidĂŠwĂŠw|lidĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidawaw|lilidawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidĂŠwĂŠw|lilidĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodawaw|kodawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodĂŠwĂŠw|kodĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodawaw|kokodawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodĂŠwĂŠw|kokodĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedawaw|kedawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedĂŠwĂŠw|kedĂŠwĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedawaw|kekedawaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedĂŠwĂŠw|kekedĂŠwĂŠw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
